infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: AmberKitchen uses your location for restaurant distance, delivery ETA, and live driver tracking.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: AmberKitchen uses camera access for driver selfie verification and onboarding document capture.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: AmberKitchen uses photo library access for driver Aadhaar and selfie uploads.
